understand how people feel about the country about what's going on in the country and here in Elyria I'd love to get your thoughts on the direction of the country Do you feel it's going in the right direction or the wrong direction Okay thank you Hi there Good good I'm with a project called Ground Truth We're just out here trying to listen to our neighbors Okay I just want to ask how you feel about the direction of the country Is it going in the right track wrong track Probably wrong Wrong track Yeah I would say so Tell me more What are you specifically trying to do Sorry I don't have time for like a huge conversation Yeah okay I am with Ground Truth We actually give our information to the Democratic Party We're trying to help them but what we're really trying to do is listen because we feel like neither party is really listening very well So I just have two real quick questions On a scale of zero to ten how do you feel about voting Zero is you don't care about voting and ten is voting is very important to you Five is kind of in the middle An eight An eight Awesome Pretty important And on a scale of zero to ten how aligned do you feel with any one of the political parties Where ten is one of them totally stands for what you need and believe and zero of none of them stands for what you need or believe An eight About an eight Okay And which political party Democrat Democrat Awesome Yeah so if you were a politician and could do one thing to make your life better what would that be I mean just help the poor Help the poor Yeah I mean the prices are outrageous these days You can't afford it Absolutely Tell me more I mean maybe just like the assistance programs with the EBT and just gas prices are crazy Just food is unaffordable Just everything about today's prices and the economy is just terrible Absolutely Absolutely So I'd love to pass those concerns along to Sherrod Brown's office And what I need to do that is to get your name So what's your name Last name I'll spell it for you Thank you T A K A C H T A K A C H Okay and your phone number 216 415 9226 Okay so I will send you a text with just what I would send on to Sherrod Brown's office And I need you to say yes or like it or anything like that just to give me a confession to pass along Can you do that for me Yep Awesome Thank you so much Yeah thanks Take care Departing 221 George Street She because we feel like we're not listening enough in this country We're sort of too split into two different camps right So my question is how do you feel about the direction of the country I'm okay with it It is what it is It is what it is Yeah Okay So I'd love to hear more about that I have two quick questions On a scale of 0 to 10 how do you feel about voting Where 0 is you vote Okay so on a scale of 0 to 10 where 0 is you don't care 10 is you I care Okay And again on a scale of 0 to 10 how aligned do you feel with any one of the political parties With any one of the political parties Where 10 is one of them totally stands for what you need and believe And 0 is none of them stand for what you need and believe And 5 One of them more or less stands for what I believe Okay so on a scale of 0 to 10 can you give me a number 9 perfect And which party would that be I'm not telling you Okay fair enough fair enough Yeah so if you were a politician and you could do one thing to make your life better what would that be What would you like a politician to do There's numerous things Yeah You can tell me I'm here to listen Cut back on our taxes Hold on girl Cut back on our taxes Yep Keep our gun rights Yep Ban abortion Ban abortion I don't like the LGBTs I don't like that they enforce it on me They need to go back in the closet They can do what they want to do That's up to them That's between them and God But I don't want to see it I don't want to see you holding hands I don't want to see you kissing And I don't want my kids or my grandkids to see it Okay So let me see if I gay But you just don't want to see it I don't want to see it Yeah right And there were two other things Ban abortion But I do have stipulations with that Even though it goes against my religious belief If a girl is raised sexist But aborting a baby isn't broken faith And what was the last one I said That was the very first one I think is the one I missed No that was gun control Yeah right Anyway Yeah So I would like to pass that along to Sherry Brown's office Okay And in order to do that I'll need to get your name I don't know who you are I don't see any badges on you You're a stranger to me Stranger danger Fair enough That's why I can't see where you're at I'm not making my dad Okay that's totally fine But if you get that tree taken down that would be lovely Get the tree taken down
